text: polos vetimotios 'avedey hamashicha yeshu'a el-kal-haqedshim bamashicha yeshu'a asher hem befilipi 'im-hahegemonim vehashamashim
chesed lakhem veshalom meet haelohim avinu vaadoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha
ode lelohay midey zakheri etekhem
vetamid bekhal-tefilotay etechanen besimecha be'ad kulekhem
'al-hitechaberutekhem el-habesora lemin-hayom harishon ve'ad-hena
uvatucha ani bamatechil bakhem hama'ase hatov shegam-yigemerenu 'ad-yom yeshu'a hamashicha
karauy li lachashov lekhulekhem ba'avur seeti etekhem bilevavi bemoseray uvehatsediqi vechazeqi et-habesora ki atem kulekhem chaveray bechased
ki haelohim le'ed li asher nikhesafeti lekhulekhem beahavat yeshu'a hamashicha
ve'al-zot mitepalel anokhi she'od tirebe vetigedal ahavatekhem lehasekel ulekhal-da'at
lema'an tede'u beyn tov lara' viheyitem zakim uveli mikheshol 'ad-yom hamashicha
meleim peri hatsedaqa 'al-yedey yeshu'a hamashicha likhevod elohim velitehilato
vehineni modi'a etekhem echay ki mah-sheba 'alay lo va ela leyiteron habesora
'ad asher nigelu moserotay bamashicha bekhal-sha'ar hamelekh ulekhol hanishearim
verov haachim baadoneynu hosifu omets bemoserotay vehitechazequ vilevavam ledaber et-hadavar beli-fachad
hen yesh makherizim et-hamashicha miqinea variv veyesh makherizim mimachashava tova
ele mimeriva makherizim et-hamashicha lo velev-tahor ki chshevim lehosif tsara 'al-moseray
veele meahava baasher hem yode'im ki-natun anokhi lehatsediq et-habesora
ela mah-bekhakh uvilevad sheyukheraz hamashicha beyn ba'alila uveyn beemet bazot ani samecha vegam eheye samech
ki yode'a ani shegam zot tiheyeh-li lishu'a bitefilatekhem uve'ezerat rucha yeshu'a hamashicha
veochil vaaqave shel evosh mikal-davar ki im-bekhal-bitachon kaasher meaz ken 'ata yitegadel hamashicha begufi im-bechayay im-bemoti
ki hamashicha hu chayay vehamavet revach-li
ela im-chayay babasar yosif-li peri 'amali lo eda' bema evechar
ki achuz ani misheney tsedadim nafeshi iveta lehipater veliheyot 'im-hamashicha ki-ze hamuvechar
aval 'amod 'od babasar tsarikh yoter ba'avurekhem
vaani votecha veyode'a sheivater vee'emod 'im-kulekhem yachad leamets etekhem ulehagedil simechat emunatekhem
lema'an tirebe 'al-yadi tehilatekhem bamashicha yeshu'a beshuvi lavo aleykhem
raq hitenahagu karauy livesorat hamashicha lema'an eshema' 'aleykhem im-bevoi lireotekhem im-biheyoti rachoq sheqayamim atem berucha achat ve'ozerim oti nefesh achat lehilachem be'ad emunat habesora
veeynekhem charedim meuma mipeney hamiteqomamim asher zot lahem ot leavedam velakhem lishu'atekhem vegam-zot meet haelohim
ki-lakhem nitan lehite'anot be'ad hamashicha velo-lehaamin bo bilevad
ki gam-lakhem hamilechama asher reitem bi vaasher 'ata shome'im atem 'alay
lakhen im-yesh tokhachat bamashicha im-tanechumot haahava im-cheverat rucha im-rachamim vechemela
hashelimu-na et-simechati biheyot lakhem lev echad veahava achat venefesh achat veratson echad
veal-ta'asu davar bederekh meriva o kevod shave ki im-beshifelut rucha yacheshov ish et-re'ehu gadol mimenu
kal-echad al-yideag laasher-lo levado ki im-gam laasher lachavero
ki yehi levavekhem kilevav hamashicha yeshu'a
asher af ki-haya bidemut haelohim lo-chashav lo leshalal heyoto shave lelohim
ki im-hifeshit et-'atsemo vayilebash demut 'eved vayehi dome liveney adam vayimatse vitekhunato keven adam
vayashepel et-nafesho vayikana' 'ad-mavet 'ad-mitat hatseliva
'al-ken higebiho haelohim meod vayiten-lo shem na'ale 'al-kal-shem
asher beshem yeshu'a tikhera' kal-berekh asher bashamayim uvaarets umitachat laarets
vekhal-lashon tode ki adon yeshu'a hamashicha likhevod elohim haav
lakhen chavivay kaasher shema'etem li bekhal-'et ken lo biheyoti etselekhem bilevad ela-'od yoter 'ata kesheani rachoq mikem tige'u liteshu'at nafeshoteykhem beyirea uvire'ada
ki haelohim hu hapo'el bakhem gam-lachepots gam-life'ol kefi retsono
'asu kal-davar belo telunot uvelo mezimot
lema'an tiheyu neqiyim utehorim beney elohim eyn-mum bam betokh dor 'iqesh ufetaletol asher-tairu veyneyhem kimeorot ba'olam
machaziqim bidevar hachayim litehila li beyom hamashicha asher lo lechinam ratseti velo lariq yaga'eti
aval gam ki-usakh 'al-zevach emunatekhem va'avodatah hineni samecha vesas 'im-kulekhem
vekhakha simechu af-atem vesisu 'imadi
veqiveyti beyeshu'a adoneynu lishelocha aleykhem bimehera et-timotios lema'an tanucha da'eti behivada' li shelomekhem
ki zulato eyn-iti ish kilevavi asher belev shalem yideag lakhem
ki khulam et asher-lahem yidershu velo et-asher leyeshu'a hamashicha
veoto yeda'etem ki vachun hu asher kaben ha'oved et-aviv ken haya iti ba'avodat habesora
veoto aqave lishelocha aleykhem maher kaasher eree mah-yiheye li
uvatacheti vaadoneynu asher gam-anokhi avo aleykhem bimehera
vechashaveti lechova li lishelocha aleykhem et-epaferoditos achi ve'ozeri vachaveri vatsava vehu shelichakhem umesharati bitserakhay
mipeney shehaya nikhesaf lekhulekhem vene'etsav meod 'al-asher shema'etem ki chala
amenam chalo chala venata lamut aval haelohim richam 'alayv velo 'alayv bilevad ki gam-'alay richam shel-yavo 'alay yagon 'al-yagon
lakhen mihareti ushelachetiv aleykhem lema'an tireuhu vetashuvu lisemocha vegam-yime'at yegoni
'al-ken qabeluhu vaadoneynu bekhal-simecha vehoqiru anashim kamohu
ki ve'ad ma'ase hamashicha higi'a 'ad-mavet vateqal nafesho be'eynayv lema'an yemale et-asher chasaretem besharetekhem oti
ve'od achay simechu vaadoneynu hen-likhetov velishenot lakhem kazot lo torach hu li velakhem hu lechizuq
hizaharu min-hakelavim hizaharu min-hapo'alim hara'im hizaharu min-hachitukh
ki anachenu beney hamila ha'ovedim et-haelohim barucha umitepaarim bamashicha yeshu'a veeynenu votechim babasar
af 'al-pi shegam-li yesh livetocha babasar veim-yomar ish sheyakhol hu livetocha babasar ani 'al achat kama vekhama
sheani nimol ben-shemonat yamim mibeney yiserael mishevet bineyamin 'iveri min ha'iverim
letora parush leqinea rodef et-ha'eda uletsideqat hatora beli-dofi
vehayiteronot haele chashaveti li lecheseronot lema'an hamashicha
vegam ani chshev et-hakol lecheseron le'umat ma'alat da'at yeshu'a hamashicha adoni asher ba'avuro chisareti et-nafeshi mikal-ele vaecheshevem lisechi leharevicha et-hamashicha ulehimatse vo
velo tiheyeh-li tsideqati mitokh hatora ki im-beemunat hamashicha hatsedaqa habaa meet haelohim baemuna
lada'at oto veet-gevurat techiyato vecheverat 'inuyayv ulehidamot lemoto
ulay ukhal lehagi'a litechiyat hametim
lo keilu shehisageti o shehashelameti aval eredof ulay asig kaasher gam-hisigani hamashicha yeshu'a
achay eyneni omer shekevar hisageti akhe-achat dibareti ki-shokhecha ani et-asher meacharay veeshetatecha el-asher lefanay
veel-hamatara eredof et-sekhar hanitsachon asher hu baqeria shel-ma'ela meet haelohim bamashicha yeshu'a
lakhen mi shehu shalem banu ken yachashov veim-tacheshevu machashava acheret gam-zot yegale lakhem haelohim
raq achar higa'enu 'ad-hena al-net min-hadarekh
achay heyu chaverim laholekhim acharay vehabitu el-haholekhim ken kaasher anachenu mofet lakhem
ki rabim haholekhim asher amareti lakhem pe'amim rabot ve'ata gam-bivekhi ani omer ki-oyevey tseluv hamashicha hem
asher acharitam haavadon asher keresam eloheyhem ukhevodam bevashetam veqirebam haveley chaled
ki ezerachutenu bashamayim hi umisham mechakim anachenu lemoshi'enu adoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha
asher yachalif et-gufenu hashafel liheyoto dome leguf kevodo kefi-fe'ulat yekhaleto likhebsh hakol tachetayv
'al-ken achay hachavivim vehanechemadim simechati va'ateret roshi 'imedu-na khen baadoneynu chavivay
et-avehodiya ani mazehir veet-sunetikhi ani mazehir liheyot lev-echad baadoneynu
veata chaveri hanitsemad-li veemet af-mimekha ani mevaqesh liheyot le'ezer leotam sheyage'u 'imadi 'al-habesora 'im-qelimis ve'im-shear tomekhay asher shemotam yachad besefer hachayim
simechu vaadoneynu bekhal-'et ve'od hapa'am omer ani semachu
'anevat ruchakhem tivada' lekhal-ish qarov hu haadon
al-tideagu ki im-bitefila uvetachanunim 'im-toda tavona mishealoteykhem lekhal-davar lifeney eloheynu
ushelom elohim hana'ale 'al-kal-sekhel yinetsor et-levavekhem veet-macheshevoteykhem bamashicha yeshu'a
sof davar achay kal-asher hu emet venikhebad veyashar vetahor vena'im vaasher shame'o tov kal-ma'ase tsedeq kal-ma'ase shevach 'al-ele tasimu levavekhem
asher lemadetem veqibaletem ushema'etem ureitem bi et-ele ta'asu velohey hashalom yiheye 'imakhem
vaani samacheti meod baadoneynu ki-'ata hapa'am hechelafetem kocha lehashegicha 'alay vegam-mashegichim heyitem 'ad-ko ela shel-'aleta veyedekhem
velo mimachesor adaber ken ki lamadeti lehisetapeq bemah-sheyesh li
yode'a ani la'amod be'oni veyode'a ani lehotir muregal ani lekhal-davar veofan hen lisebo'a hen lire'ov hen la'amod beshefa' hen lachasor
et-kol ukhal be'ezerat hamashicha hanoten li kocha
aval heytavetem la'asot behitechaberekhem elay betsarati
veyode'im gam-atem filipiyim shebereshit habesora ketseti mimaqedoneya lo-hitechabera li achat min-haqehilot lemasa umatan ki im-atem bilevad
ki-gam betaseloniqi shelachetem li et-tserakhay pa'am ushetayim
lo sheavaqesh et-hamatan ela avaqesh haperi asher-yirebe becheshebonekhem
vaani qibaleti et-hakol veyesh-li day vehoter vaani nimeleti beqabeli midey epaferoditos et-kol asher-shelachetem reycha nichocha zevach 'arev veratsuy lelohim
velohay hu yemale et-kal-tsarekekhem ke'sher kevodo bamashicha yeshu'a
velelohim avinu hakavod le'olemey 'olamim amen
shaalu lishelom kal-qadosh bamashicha yeshu'a haachim asher 'imi shoalim lishelomekhem
kal-haqedshim shoalim lishelomekhem uveyoter shel-beyt qeysar
chesed yeshu'a hamashicha adoneynu 'im ruchakhem amen ﻿
